description: MCP server bridging OpenGrok search engine with AI for instant context across massive codebases.
name: io.github.IcyHot09/opengrok-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok authentication password. Prefer storing via OS keychain using 'npx opengrok-mcp-server setup'.
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Verify TLS certificates. Set to false for self-signed or internal CA certs.
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_VERIFY_SSL

environmentVariables.description: Enable Code Mode: 5-tool sandbox interface with env.opengrok.* JavaScript API. Saves 80-95% tokens on large codebases.
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_CODE_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Default project to scope all searches. Can be overridden per call.
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_DEFAULT_PROJECT

environmentVariables.description: Response size tier controlling token usage.
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_CONTEXT_BUDGET

environmentVariables.description: Enable interactive project picker at session start and env.opengrok.elicit() in Code Mode sandbox. Requires a supporting MCP client.
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_ELICITATION

environmentVariables.description: Model preference for MCP Sampling (used for error explanation and query reformulation).
environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MODEL

title: OpenGrok MCP Server
